steps.title: Recognize the transformation
steps.content: When a graph is translated up 4 units, every output value increases by 4. This means $g(x) = f(x) + 4$. To find $g(0)$, we need to calculate $f(0) + 4$.

steps.title: Evaluate f(0) using the factored form
steps.content:
The factored form is efficient here—substitute $x = 0$ directly without expanding:
$$f(0) = (0 - 9)(0 - 6)(0 - 5) = (-9)(-6)(-5)$$
Multiply left to right: $(-9) \times (-6) = 54$, then $54 \times (-5) = -270$.

So $f(0) = -270$.
